name: Overwhelming Axehead
description: History Before Exalt Version 5.3.0.0 (Nov 2024), this item had 200 MP Cost.
effects: Unstoppable Force: Launches a giant projectile with 7 hitboxes Relentless Recharge: On shooting after ability use, restore 2 MP/shot for 5 seconds MP Decrease (-50 MP) on self for 5 seconds Shots hit multiple targets Ignores defense of target Shots pass through obstacles
